---
title: "ABFM Levy Elasticity Models"
author: "MVH & AW"
format: 
  html:
    theme: lumen
    code-fold: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    tbl-cap-location: margin
    fig-cap-location: top
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 200px
---

```{r setup}

#| code-fold: true
#| output: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(plm)
library(stars)
library(lmtest)
library(huxtable)
library(jtools)
```

```{r load_data}

#| code-fold: true
#| output: false

df <- read.csv("panel_data.csv")

summary(df)

df_panel <- pdata.frame(df, index = c("agency_num", "year")) 
```

# Two-Way Fixed Effects Models

## Naive Model

```{r twfe_naive}

#| code-fold: true

naive_mod <- plm(log_levy ~ log_av,
                 model = "within",
                 effect = "twoways",
                 data = df_panel)

summary(naive_mod)

muni_subset <- subset(df_panel, minor_type == "MUNI" | agency_name == "TOWN CICERO")

naive_mod_munis <- plm(log_levy ~ log_av,
                         model = "within",
                         effect = "twoways",
                         data = muni_subset)

summary(naive_mod_munis)

hr_subset <- subset(df_panel, home_rule_ind == 1)

nhr_subset <- subset(df_panel, home_rule_ind == 0)

naive_mod_hr <- plm(log_levy ~ log_av,
                         model = "within",
                         effect = "twoways",
                         data = hr_subset)

summary(naive_mod_hr)

school_subset <- subset(df_panel, major_type == "SCHOOL")

naive_mod_school <- plm(log_levy ~ log_av,
                        model = "within",
                         effect = "twoways",
                         data = school_subset)

summary(naive_mod_school)

ele_school_subset <- subset(df_panel, major_type == "SCHOOL" 
                              & minor_type == "ELEMENTARY")

naive_mod_ele_school <- plm(log_levy ~ log_av,
                            model = "within",
                            effect = "twoways",
                            data = ele_school_subset)

summary(naive_mod_ele_school)
```
